lambda.version.CfnAbout: The `AWS::Lambda::Version` resource creates a [version](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/latest/dg/versioning-aliases.html) from the current code and configuration of a function. Use versions to create a snapshot of your function code and configuration that doesn't change.

lambda.version.CodeSha256.Description: Only publish a version if the hash value matches the value that's specified. Use this option to avoid publishing a version if the function code has changed since you last updated it. Updates are not supported for this property.

lambda.version.Description.Description: A description for the version to override the description in the function configuration. Updates are not supported for this property.

lambda.version.FunctionName.Description: The name of the Lambda function.

lambda.version.ProvisionedConcurrencyCon.Description: Specifies a provisioned concurrency configuration for a function's version. Updates are not supported for this property.
